rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"An agent can exit plan mode without writing any code — plan success != implementation executed. Always verify the Write/Edit tool was actually called.","scope":"agent execution"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The review agent detects issues but does not write files. A fixup stage targeting a missing deliverable must do the implementation itself, not re-invoke the review agent.","scope":"agent design"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Fix stages should create the missing deliverable (the test file) directly rather than re-running the agent that was supposed to produce it.","scope":"pipeline design"}]}
